title: passiflora involucrata
intro: Passiflora involucrata, also known as the Purple Passionflower, is a perennial vine native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its sedative and antispasmodic properties, which have been found to have a calming effect on the nervous system. The health benefits of Passiflora involucrata include reducing anxiety and insomnia, as well as alleviating symptoms of restlessness and irritability. Herbal preparations of Passiflora involucrata can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
